briefing_zh:
今天的 AI 研究呈现出 GUI 自动化和 Agent 评测两大主线。**UI-Copilot** 和 **UI-Zoomer** 两篇论文分别从工具增强策略优化和不确定性驱动的自适应缩放两个角度推进了长时程 GUI 自动化的能力边界，表明 Computer Use Agent 正从「能点击」迈向「能规划复杂多步操作」的阶段。与此同时，alphaxiv 上的 **ClawBench** 在 144 个真实网站上测试了 153 个写操作任务，前沿模型成功率仅 0.7%-33.3%，与 HuggingFace 上的 **GameWorld** 和 **OccuBench** 一起，勾勒出当前 Agent 能力的真实边界。

开源社区方面，**fireworks-tech-graph** 以 3000+ 星的速度爆发，展示了 Claude Code 生态的技术图谱生成能力。**GAIA** 框架在 Hacker News 上获得 154 点热度，主打本地硬件运行 AI Agent，反映出社区对去中心化 Agent 部署的强烈需求。Meta 的 **Neural Computers** 在 alphaxiv 上以 3454 次浏览领跑，提出将计算、内存和 I/O 内化到神经网络运行时状态的新范式。

值得关注的是 **TREX**——通过树形探索自动化 LLM 微调流程，以及 Hacker News 上关于「AI Agent 是否需要像员工一样购买软件许可」的讨论，后者可能深远影响 Agent 商业化的成本结构。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research reveals two dominant threads: **GUI automation agents** and **agent capability benchmarking**. **UI-Copilot** and **UI-Zoomer** from HuggingFace push long-horizon GUI automation forward—the former through tool-integrated policy optimization, the latter via uncertainty-driven adaptive zoom for better grounding. Meanwhile, **ClawBench** on alphaxiv tested 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live websites where frontier models scored only 0.7%–33.3%, painting a sobering picture alongside **GameWorld** and **OccuBench** of where agents actually stand.

In open source, **fireworks-tech-graph** exploded to 3,000+ stars as a Claude Code skill for generating production-quality technical diagrams. **GAIA** hit 154 points on Hacker News with its local-hardware AI agent framework, signaling strong demand for decentralized agent deployment. Meta's **Neural Computers** leads alphaxiv with 3,454 views, proposing a paradigm where neural models internalize computation, memory, and I/O.

Notable developments include **TREX** for automated LLM fine-tuning via agent-driven tree exploration, and a provocative Hacker News discussion about Microsoft suggesting AI agents may need software licenses like employees—a potential inflection point for agent deployment economics.
viral_analysis_zh: 今天最可能火的是 **fireworks-tech-graph**（3005⭐）——它精准切入了 Claude Code 用户「想要漂亮技术图但不想学设计工具」的痛点，skill 形态降低了使用门槛。**GAIA** 框架在 HN 的热度（154pts）则验证了「本地运行 AI Agent」这个叙事的吸引力——隐私焦虑 + 成本控制 + 开源信仰三重驱动。
viral_analysis_en: **fireworks-tech-graph** (3,005⭐) is today's breakout hit—it targets the exact pain point of Claude Code users wanting production-quality technical diagrams without learning design tools. The skill format lowers the barrier perfectly. **GAIA** framework's HN traction (154pts) validates the 'run AI agents on local hardware' narrative, driven by privacy concerns, cost control, and open-source ethos.

huggingface_papers.title: UI-Copilot: Advancing Long-Horizon GUI Automation via Tool-Integrated Policy Optimization
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes a tool-integrated policy optimization approach for long-horizon GUI automation. By augmenting the agent with reusable tools and optimizing the policy end-to-end, UI-Copilot significantly outperforms prior methods on complex multi-step GUI tasks requiring planning over dozens of actions.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出工具增强的策略优化方法用于长时程 GUI 自动化。通过为 Agent 配备可复用工具并端到端优化策略，UI-Copilot 在需要数十步规划的复杂 GUI 任务上显著超越现有方法。

huggingface_papers.title: UI-Zoomer: Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Zoom-In for GUI Grounding
huggingface_papers.tldr: Addresses the GUI grounding challenge by introducing uncertainty-driven adaptive zoom-in. When the model is uncertain about element location, it progressively zooms into regions of interest, dramatically improving click accuracy on small or visually similar UI elements.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 通过不确定性驱动的自适应缩放解决 GUI 定位难题。当模型对元素位置不确定时，渐进式放大感兴趣区域，大幅提升对小型或视觉相似 UI 元素的点击准确率。

huggingface_papers.title: GameWorld: Towards Standardized and Verifiable Evaluation of Multimodal Game Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: Creates a standardized evaluation framework for multimodal game agents with verifiable metrics. Provides consistent benchmarks across diverse game environments, enabling fair comparison of agent architectures and revealing that current models still struggle with complex game reasoning.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 建立了多模态游戏 Agent 的标准化可验证评估框架。提供跨多种游戏环境的一致基准，实现 Agent 架构的公平比较，揭示当前模型在复杂游戏推理方面仍存在不足。

huggingface_papers.title: OccuBench: Evaluating AI Agents on Real-World Professional Tasks via Language Worlds
huggingface_papers.tldr: Benchmarks AI agents on realistic professional tasks using language-based world simulations. Covers diverse occupations with graded difficulty, showing frontier models handle routine tasks but fail on complex professional reasoning requiring domain expertise and multi-step planning.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 通过语言世界模拟在真实职业任务上评测 AI Agent。覆盖多种职业分级难度，显示前沿模型能完成常规任务但在需要领域专业知识和多步规划的复杂职业推理上失败。

huggingface_papers.title: TREX: Automating LLM Fine-tuning via Agent-Driven Tree-based Exploration
huggingface_papers.tldr: Automates the LLM fine-tuning process using an agent that explores a tree of hyperparameter and data configurations. TREX systematically searches the optimization landscape, reducing the need for manual tuning while achieving competitive or superior results.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 用 Agent 驱动的树形探索自动化 LLM 微调流程。TREX 系统性地搜索超参数和数据配置的优化空间，减少人工调参需求，同时达到有竞争力甚至更优的结果。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Neural Computers
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Meta AI proposes Neural Computers—a paradigm where neural models internalize computation, memory, and I/O within a learned runtime state. Prototype NCs generate high-fidelity terminal screens and control GUI interactions from user I/O traces, pointing toward fully neural operating systems.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Meta AI 提出 Neural Computers——神经网络将计算、内存和 I/O 内化到学习的运行时状态中。原型 NC 可从用户 I/O 轨迹生成高保真终端屏幕并控制 GUI 交互，指向全神经网络操作系统的未来。

alphaxiv_papers.title: ClawBench: A Benchmark for AI Agents on Real-World Web Tasks
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Tests AI agents on 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live production websites with safe interception. Frontier models achieve only 0.7%–33.3% success rates, revealing a massive gap between benchmark performance and real-world web automation capability.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 在 144 个真实网站上测试 AI Agent 执行 153 个写操作任务。前沿模型成功率仅 0.7%-33.3%，揭示了基准测试性能与真实网页自动化能力之间的巨大鸿沟。

alphaxiv_papers.title: In-Place Test-Time Training
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Repurposes existing MLP blocks for efficient chunk-wise test-time training with next-token prediction. Achieves consistent improvements on long-context benchmarks (RULER) with negligible computational overhead, offering a practical path to dynamic model adaptation.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 复用现有 MLP 块进行高效的分块测试时训练。在长上下文基准（RULER）上持续提升，计算开销几乎为零，为动态模型自适应提供了实用路径。

alphaxiv_papers.title: PaperOrchestra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Research Paper Generation
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google's multi-agent framework converts unstructured pre-writing materials into submission-ready research papers. Achieves simulated acceptance rates of 84% at CVPR and 81% at ICLR, with deep literature reviews and diverse visualizations.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google 的多 Agent 框架将非结构化预写材料转化为可投稿的论文。模拟录用率达 CVPR 84%、ICLR 81%，包含深度文献综述和多样化可视化。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillClaw: Agentic Skill Evolution for LLM Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Introduces an agentic evolver that auto-refines LLM agent skills through collective cross-user interaction. Achieves +42.1% average improvement in validation, enabling continuous skill evolution without manual intervention.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 引入自主进化器，通过跨用户集体交互自动优化 LLM Agent 技能。验证中平均提升 42.1%，无需人工干预即可持续进化技能。

github_repos.name: yizhiyanhua-ai/fireworks-tech-graph
github_repos.tldr: Claude Code skill for generating production-quality SVG+PNG technical architecture diagrams. Integrates directly into the Claude Code workflow, letting developers create professional visualizations of system architectures without leaving their terminal.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Claude Code 技能，生成生产级 SVG+PNG 技术架构图。直接集成到 Claude Code 工作流，开发者无需离开终端即可创建专业的系统架构可视化。

github_repos.name: EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui
github_repos.tldr: Web dashboard for Hermes Agent providing multi-platform AI chat interface, session management, and tool visualization. Offers a browser-based alternative to CLI interaction with full feature parity.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Hermes Agent 的 Web 仪表板，提供多平台 AI 聊天界面、会话管理和工具可视化。作为 CLI 交互的浏览器端替代方案，功能完全对等。

github_repos.name: h4ckf0r0day/obscura
github_repos.tldr: Headless browser built specifically for AI agents and web scraping. Handles anti-bot detection, JavaScript rendering, and provides a clean API for agent-driven web interaction at scale.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 专为 AI Agent 和网页抓取构建的无头浏览器。处理反机器人检测、JavaScript 渲染，提供简洁 API 供 Agent 大规模驱动网页交互。

github_repos.name: run-llama/ParseBench
github_repos.tldr: Document parsing benchmark for AI agents from LlamaIndex. Evaluates how well different parsing approaches extract structured information from diverse document formats—crucial infrastructure for RAG and agent knowledge pipelines.
github_repos.tldr_zh: LlamaIndex 推出的 AI Agent 文档解析基准。评估不同解析方法从多种文档格式中提取结构化信息的能力——RAG 和 Agent 知识管道的关键基础设施。

github_repos.name: seojoonkim/memkraft
github_repos.tldr: Zero-dependency compound knowledge system for AI agents. Implements hierarchical memory with forgetting, consolidation, and contradiction detection—mimicking human memory processes for more natural agent long-term knowledge management.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI Agent 的零依赖复合知识系统。实现带遗忘、巩固和矛盾检测的分层记忆——模仿人类记忆过程，实现更自然的 Agent 长期知识管理。

hackernews.title: GAIA – Open-source framework for building AI agents that run on local hardware
hackernews.tldr: Open-source framework enabling AI agents to run entirely on local hardware. Targets developers who want agent capabilities without cloud dependency, addressing privacy, latency, and cost concerns in one package.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 开源框架，让 AI Agent 完全在本地硬件上运行。面向不想依赖云服务的开发者，一站式解决隐私、延迟和成本问题。

hackernews.title: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
hackernews.tldr: Finance-specialized coding agent modeled after Claude Code but tailored for Wall Street workflows. Integrates financial data APIs, compliance checks, and quantitative analysis tools into an agentic coding environment.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 面向华尔街的金融专用编程 Agent，以 Claude Code 为蓝本。将金融数据 API、合规检查和量化分析工具集成到 Agent 编程环境中。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Libretto – Making AI browser automations deterministic
hackernews.tldr: Makes AI-driven browser automation deterministic and reproducible. Addresses the core reliability problem of AI browser agents by ensuring consistent execution across runs, crucial for production deployment of web automation.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 让 AI 驱动的浏览器自动化变得确定性和可复现。解决 AI 浏览器 Agent 的核心可靠性问题，确保跨运行的一致执行，对网页自动化生产部署至关重要。

hackernews.title: Show HN: A memory database that forgets, consolidates, and detects contradiction
hackernews.tldr: Database designed for AI agent memory that implements human-like forgetting curves, memory consolidation, and contradiction detection. Goes beyond simple vector stores to create more realistic and manageable long-term agent memory.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 为 AI Agent 记忆设计的数据库，实现类人遗忘曲线、记忆巩固和矛盾检测。超越简单向量存储，创建更真实可管理的 Agent 长期记忆。

hackernews.title: Microsoft exec suggests AI agents will need to buy licenses, just like employees
hackernews.tldr: Microsoft executive floats the idea that AI agents should purchase software licenses like human employees. If adopted, this would fundamentally change the cost structure of agent deployment and create a new revenue model for SaaS companies.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 微软高管提出 AI Agent 应像员工一样购买软件许可。若被采纳，将从根本上改变 Agent 部署的成本结构，为 SaaS 公司创造新的收入模式。
